attributes.description:
Sets the background color of the camera component. This is the main background color that appears behind all camera content.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-background

Sets the text and icon color of the camera component. This determines what color the text and icons appear in.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-color

Sets the border color of the camera component. This determines what color the border around the camera appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-border-color

Controls the border thickness of the camera component. This determines how thick the border around the camera appears.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-border-width

Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the camera component. This makes the camera appear with rounded corners instead of sharp edges.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-border-radius

Controls the minimum height of the camera component. This determines the minimum vertical space the camera occupies.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-min-height

Controls the minimum width of the camera component. This determines the minimum horizontal space the camera occupies.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-min-width

Sets the internal spacing inside the camera component. This creates breathing room around the camera content.
CSS variable: --wm-camera-padding
